note_main_file: id=80 Improved Shadow Bolt (spec_tree=-1) — Shadow Bolt flags=[1,0,0] CONFIRMED CORRECT via .spellinfo all 686.
id=82 Cataclysm (spec_tree=-1) — all-ones, carrier SB(686) confirmed Warlock family.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Warlock family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1,0,0]=0x00000001 (mask0 bit0). Shadow Bolt damage +1%/rank. NOTE: talent also applies a debuff to target; this entry only models the DAMAGE bonus.

talent_affixes._todo: Aftermath (2r, tier 2) — Your Fire spells have a 7/14% chance to daze the target. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Firebolt (2r, tier 2) — Reduces cast time of Imp's Firebolt by 0.5/1 sec. Pet ability, not player SpellMod.
Improved Lash of Pain (2r, tier 2) — Reduces cooldown of Succubus's Lash of Pain. Pet ability, not player SpellMod.
Molten Skin (3r, tier 2) — Reduces all damage taken by 2/4/6%. Passive mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Bane
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[5,131072,0]: OR of SB(686) mask0 bit0(0x1=1)|Immolate(348) mask0 bit2(0x4=4)|Chaos Bolt(50796) mask1 bit17(0x20000=131072). No shared Warlock marker bits. Cast time -100ms/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Cataclysm
talent_affixes.notes: All Warlock spell mana cost -1%/rank — all-ones mask matches every Warlock family spell. Carrier SB(686) confirmed Warlock family.

talent_affixes._todo: Shadowburn (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Destructive Reach (2r, tier 3) — Increases range of Destruction spells by 10/20%. RANGE units unclear; deferring until confirmed in-game.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Searing Pain
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[256,0,0]=0x00000100 (mask0 bit8). No shared Warlock marker bits. Searing Pain crit chance +4%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 400=4%).

talent_affixes._todo: Pyroclasm (2r, tier 4) — Your Rain of Fire, Hellfire, and Soul Fire have a 13/26% chance to stun the target. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Shadowfury (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Emberstorm
talent_affixes.notes: Fire spell damage +3%/rank. All-ones used — 'Fire school' cannot be targeted by Warlock family SpellMod as a subset; acceptable scope for Destruction spec affixes.

talent_affixes._todo: Backlash (3r, tier 5) — Being hit by a physical attack has a 8/16/25% chance to make your next Incinerate or Shadow Bolt instant. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Fire and Brimstone
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[4,8388608,0]: OR of Immolate(348) mask0 bit2(0x4=4)|Conflagrate(17962) mask1 bit23(0x800000=8388608). No shared Warlock marker bits. Immolate/Conflagrate damage +4%/rank. NOTE: talent also reduces mana cost — a second entry (COST PCT -4%/rank, same flags) can be added if desired.

talent_affixes._todo: Conflagrate (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Soul Leech (3r, tier 7) — Your Shadowburn, Shadow Bolt, and Incinerate crits restore 20/30/40% of damage done as health. Proc-based self-heal, not implementable as SpellMod.
Empowered Imp (3r, tier 7) — Increases spell power of Imp by 10/20/30% and after Imp crits your next spell crit is guaranteed. Proc/pet bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.
Backdraft (3r, tier 8) — When Conflagrate is cast, reduces cast time of next 3 Incinerate/Chaos Bolt by 10/20/30%. Proc-based next-cast modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Empowered Chaos Bolt (verify name/rank) — if multi-rank, add after spellinfo verification.
Chaos Bolt (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
